def positive_bare_except_clause_catches_system_exit():
    rule_id = "bare_except_clause_catches_system_exit"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Bare `except:` or `except BaseException` catches SystemExit and KeyboardInterrupt unintentionally."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
